monitor_the_situation.title: Israel Claims Killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei

— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 9h ago. Israeli Defense Minister Katz claims Israel assassinated Ali Khamenei, stating it was in response to his plans to destroy Israel and warning future Iranian leaders.
Lebanon Estimates Direct War Damage from Israel at $3-4 Billion
— S3 · Economic · Lebanon · 52m ago. Lebanon's information minister stated that direct damage from the conflict with Israel is estimated at $3-4 billion, not including indirect losses.
Israel Bombs Homes in Bint Jbeil District, Southern Lebanon
— S3 · Conflict · Bint Jbeil, Lebanon · 58m ago. Israeli airstrikes target residential homes in the Bint Jbeil district of southern Lebanon, escalating ceasefire violations.
